description: baseline (DiLoCo H=15 AdamW lr=1e-3 cosine warmup500)
H=100 (comm halved but loss degraded)
weight_decay=0.1 inner AdamW (loss improved)
warmup_steps=100 (cosine decay kills LR too fast in ~167 step run)
fp16 comm (27% less comm but 0.04 worse loss)
fp16 comm H=12 (still worse loss than fp32)
outer SGD lr 0.7->0.9 (better outer correction)
outer SGD lr 1.0 (overshot)
fp16 comm + no max_norm (instability without clipping)
inner lr=0.002 (too high, warmup LR already well-tuned)
outer AdamW lr=0.01 (catastrophic, SGD essential for outer step)
fp16 all_reduce+broadcast + momentum=0.95 (comm better but loss worse)
fp16 all_reduce only fp32 broadcast (still hurts loss, 14% comm savings)
inner SGD lr=0.01 (AdamW essential, SGD diverged)
AdamW beta2=0.99 (faster variance doesn't help)
2-bit EF DiLoCo range=6 (55% less comm, loss 0.047 worse)
2-bit EF range=4 H=15 (loss 0.032 worse, narrowing gap)
2-bit EF range=4 H=12 (more syncs hurt, EF errors compound faster)
selective 2-bit EF: wte in 2-bit, transformer in fp32 (both metrics improved!)
no-broadcast attempt (master models numerically diverge without broadcast anchor)
wte range=3 (too much clipping, worse than range=4)
fp16 wte broadcast (noise propagates through H steps)
H=18 selective EF (H very sensitive, loss degrades quickly)
outer LR=0.85 with selective EF (LR=0.9 is true optimum)
Muon inner optimizer (incompatible with DiLoCo outer step)
outer weight_decay=0.01 (master model L2 hurt convergence)
skip wte broadcast (wte diverges without broadcast too)
SPARTA+DiLoCo H=30 (per-step SPARTA reduces throughput, hurts loss badly)
full 2-bit EF + momentum=0.95 (can't close loss gap vs selective EF)
constant LR=0.0003 (warmup helps, even if never completed)
AdamW beta1=0.85 (lower beta1 hurts)
separate wte/transformer grad clipping (global norm=1.0 already optimal)
max_norm=2.0 (tighter clipping was already optimal)
outer SGD no Nesterov (Nesterov essential)
weight_decay=0.15 (0.1 is the sweet spot)
split outer LR wte=0.765/transformer=0.9 (hurts loss)
outer lr=0.92 (0.9 is the true sweet spot)
4-bit EF wte (more bytes=slower comm=fewer training steps, worse)
wte range=5 (range=4 confirmed optimal for 2-bit selective EF)
warmup=100 cosine_anneal=False (gradual warmup-only schedule is optimal)
warmup=30 cosine to actual run (decreasing LR hurts, ramp is best)
max_norm=0.5 (1.0 is the exact sweet spot)
SparseDiLoCo 1% top-K (too sparse for only 11 syncs, 99% of params never updated)
MuLoCo (wte/wpe incorrectly going to Muon - no "embed" in name)
MuLoCo muon_lr=0.001 (still wte/wpe going to Muon, catastrophic)
MuLoCo correct filter, muon_lr=2.68e-2 (27x higher effective LR overshoots outer step)
MuLoCo muon_lr=0.001 correct filter (Muon fundamentally incompatible with DiLoCo outer step)
broadcast error buffer instead of model params (4% less comm, loss 0.044 worse - gloo latency)
CUDA 2-bit EF NCCL no-broadcast (non-det CUDA or NCCL uint8 issue causes divergence)
CUDA 2-bit EF all params + NCCL broadcast (transformer quantization hurts outer step)
H=20 outer_lr=0.675 (LR scaling doesn't compensate for H quality loss)
hybrid EF (4-bit transformer, 2-bit wte) - Nesterov momentum amplifies quantization noise 7x
full 2-bit EF (gloo) + broadcast (22 gloo calls/sync is slower than selective; 0.015 worse)
Lloyd-Max 2-bit quantizer (pseudo-gradients not Gaussian, worse than uniform range=4)
Lion inner lr=1e-4 (warmup scales to 3.34e-5 effective, too small for sign updates)
Lion inner lr=3e-4 (sign updates fundamentally incompatible with DiLoCo dynamics)
Adadelta inner (adaptive step without warmup doesn't work)
AdamW amsgrad=True (0.003 worse than standard AdamW)
gradient centralization (subtract mean from 2D+ grads, hurts loss)
NCCL wte EF (CPU-GPU-CPU transfers > gloo on shared memory, worse)
AdamW eps=1e-7 (default 1e-8 is optimal)
grouped weight decay (wd=0 for embed/bias hurts, uniform wd=0.1 is optimal)
reset inner exp_avg after outer sync (momentum across syncs is beneficial)
SWA outer (early snapshots are poor, averaging hurts convergence)
